tasks.subject: Task 1: Core station exclusion in outliers.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add exclude_stations to OutlierConfig, a station_mask helper, and wire it as the first check in filter_outliers.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/outliers.py, tests/test_outliers.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/outliers.py", "tests/test_outliers.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_outliers.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["OutlierConfig.exclude_stations frozenset default", "station_mask match/no-match/empty", "filter_outliers attributes to per_check[station], counts once"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CLI plumbing in _outlier_cli.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread an exclude-station list through build_config, filter_frame, and make_filter into OutlierConfig.exclude_stations.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py, tests/test_outlier_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py", "tests/test_outlier_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_outlier_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build_config exclude_stations -> frozenset", "default empty frozenset", "filter_frame exclude drops rows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: --exclude-station flag on summary and visualize
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a repeatable --exclude-station option to summary and all five visualize subcommands, passing the list into the filter; verify end-to-end.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/summary.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py, tests/test_summary.py, tests/test_visualize_cli.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/summary.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py", "tests/test_summary.py", "tests/test_visualize_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["summary --exclude-station drops + counts filtered", "all 5 visualize subcommands accept --exclude-station", "flag string identical across commands"]}
```
